Profile.Name: Panda Farmer - Dragoon Class Quests - Dragoon

LLToast.Message: Beginning Lancer class quest 'Way of the Lancer'
Beginning Lancer class quest 'My First Spear'
Beginning Lancer class quest 'Spear of the Fearless'

If.Condition: not IsQuestCompleted(65571) and not IsQuestCompleted(65754) and Core.Me.Levels[ClassJobType.Lancer] > 9

LLToast.Message: Beginning Lancer class quest 'Courage of Stone (Primary)'

If.Condition: IsQuestCompleted(65583) and not IsQuestCompleted(65679) and not IsQuestCompleted(65571) and Core.Me.Levels[ClassJobType.Lancer] > 9

LLToast.Message: Beginning Lancer class quest 'Courage of Stone (Secondary)'

If.Condition: (IsQuestCompleted(65679) or IsQuestCompleted(65571)) and not IsQuestCompleted(65591) and Core.Me.Levels[ClassJobType.Lancer] > 14

LLToast.Message: Beginning Lancer class quest 'A Dangerous Proposition'

If.Condition: not IsQuestCompleted(65592) and IsQuestCompleted(65591) and Core.Me.Levels[ClassJobType.Lancer] > 19

LLToast.Message: Beginning Lancer class quest 'Lance of Destiny'

If.Condition: not IsQuestCompleted(65974) and IsQuestCompleted(65592) and Core.Me.Levels[ClassJobType.Lancer] > 24

LLToast.Message: Beginning Lancer class quest 'Questions and Lancers'

If.Condition: not IsQuestCompleted(65975) and IsQuestCompleted(65974) and Core.Me.Levels[ClassJobType.Lancer] > 29

LLToast.Message: Beginning Lancer class quest 'Proof of Might'

If.Condition: not IsQuestCompleted(66603) and IsQuestCompleted(65975) and Core.Me.Levels[ClassJobType.Lancer] > 29

LLToast.Message: Beginning Lancer class quest 'Eye of the Dragon'

If.Condition: not IsQuestCompleted(66604) and IsQuestCompleted(66603) and Core.Me.Levels[ClassJobType.Lancer] > 34

LLToast.Message: Beginning Lancer class quest 'Lance of Fury'

If.Condition: not IsQuestCompleted(66605) and IsQuestCompleted(66604) and Core.Me.Levels[ClassJobType.Lancer] > 39

LLToast.Message: Beginning Lancer class quest 'Unfading Skies'

If.Condition: not IsQuestCompleted(66606) and IsQuestCompleted(66605) and Core.Me.Levels[ClassJobType.Lancer] > 44

LLToast.Message: Beginning Lancer class quest 'Double Dragoon'

If.Condition: not IsQuestCompleted(66607) and IsQuestCompleted(66606) and Core.Me.Levels[ClassJobType.Lancer] > 44

LLToast.Message: Beginning Lancer class quest 'Fatal Seduction'

If.Condition: not IsQuestCompleted(66608) and IsQuestCompleted(66607) and Core.Me.Levels[ClassJobType.Lancer] > 49

LLToast.Message: Beginning Lancer class quest 'Into the Dragon's Maw'

If.Condition: not IsQuestCompleted(67225) and IsQuestCompleted(65964) and IsQuestCompleted(66608) and Core.Me.Levels[ClassJobType.Lancer] > 49

LLToast.Message: Beginning Lancer class quest 'Sky's the Limit'

If.Condition: not IsQuestCompleted(67226) and IsQuestCompleted(67225) and Core.Me.Levels[ClassJobType.Lancer] > 51

LLToast.Message: Beginning Lancer class quest 'Days of Azure'

If.Condition: not IsQuestCompleted(67227) and IsQuestCompleted(67226) and Core.Me.Levels[ClassJobType.Lancer] > 51

LLToast.Message: Beginning Lancer class quest 'Heart of Justice'

If.Condition: not IsQuestCompleted(67228) and IsQuestCompleted(67227) and Core.Me.Levels[ClassJobType.Lancer] > 53

LLToast.Message: Beginning Lancer class quest 'Sworn Upon a Lance'

If.Condition: not IsQuestCompleted(67229) and IsQuestCompleted(67228) and Core.Me.Levels[ClassJobType.Lancer] > 55

LLToast.Message: Beginning Lancer class quest 'Dragoon's Errand'

If.Condition: not IsQuestCompleted(67230) and IsQuestCompleted(67229) and Core.Me.Levels[ClassJobType.Lancer] > 57

LLToast.Message: Beginning Lancer class quest 'Sanguine Dragoon'

If.Condition: not IsQuestCompleted(67231) and IsQuestCompleted(67230) and Core.Me.Levels[ClassJobType.Lancer] > 59

LLToast.Message: Beginning Lancer class quest 'Dragoon's Fate'

If.Condition: not IsQuestCompleted(68446) and IsQuestCompleted(67895) and IsQuestCompleted(67231) and Core.Me.Levels[ClassJobType.Lancer] > 59

LLToast.Message: Beginning Lancer class quest 'Friends Through Eternity'

If.Condition: not IsQuestCompleted(68447) and IsQuestCompleted(68446) and Core.Me.Levels[ClassJobType.Lancer] > 62

If.Condition: not IsQuestCompleted(68448) and IsQuestCompleted(68447) and Core.Me.Levels[ClassJobType.Lancer] > 64

If.Condition: not IsQuestCompleted(68449) and IsQuestCompleted(68448) and Core.Me.Levels[ClassJobType.Lancer] > 67

If.Condition: not IsQuestCompleted(68450) and IsQuestCompleted(68449) and Core.Me.Levels[ClassJobType.Lancer] > 69
